scripts.build:instructor: cross-env BUILD_PATH=build-instructor PUBLIC_URL=/instructor REACT_APP_BASE_PATH=/instructor REACT_APP_API_URL=http://192.168.1.42:5000 REACT_APP_MICROFRONTEND_NAME=classroom-instructor react-scripts build && node scripts/postbuild-microfrontend.js build-instructor /instructor classroom-instructor
scripts.build:student: cross-env BUILD_PATH=build-student PUBLIC_URL=/student REACT_APP_BASE_PATH=/student REACT_APP_API_URL=http://192.168.1.42:5000 REACT_APP_MICROFRONTEND_NAME=classroom-student react-scripts build && node scripts/postbuild-microfrontend.js build-student /student classroom-student
scripts.electron:student: npm run build:electron-student && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD_TARGET=student electron .
scripts.electron:instructor: npm run build:electron-instructor && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD_TARGET=instructor electron .
scripts.dist:student: npm run build:electron-student && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD_TARGET=student electron-builder --config electron/builder-student.json --win
scripts.dist:student:nocache: npx rimraf build-student dist/student node_modules/.cache && npm run dist:student
scripts.dist:instructor: npm run build:electron-instructor && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD_TARGET=instructor electron-builder --config electron/builder-instructor.json --win
scripts.dist:instructor:nocache: npx rimraf build-instructor dist/instructor node_modules/.cache && npm run dist:instructor
